en: The teacher is here.

ab: maya kivangavang anga, qiladju kilimu i ta qiladjan.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: sikalima a’adaw tucu, pulavay nu tiyav, kaciwciwli anga vayika kivangavang!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: sikadjelu nu tiyav, nu tiyave a makakecengelj vayikanga djen a kivangavang ta benulu!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: anema su kudayin nu tiyav a qadjaman?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: sikapidjulj nu tiyav, vayiq a ken sema kiyukay kati kina.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: pasumudjaq ken, vayiq a ken sema bingzu(aluvu).
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: sinsi, sakedju a ku djiyalj, pasa mabingzu.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.
May I go wash my hands?

ab: uri paluwanga ta kakituluan, galjuwanan a su sivayiq.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: sinsi, sa’edju a ku ’ulu, kivada ken nu maka kingcengelj.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: sinsi, uri kivadaq a ken nu djayvililj a sika ita qadaw, vayiq aken kipacun ta kuysang.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is paday?

ab: sa’edju a djialj ni madju, i bingzu ti madju.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is kadraw?

ab: sinsi, sa’edju a djugerau ni kadraw, na kivada tusaa ’adaw.
en: Teacher, kadraw has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: awmaya ini a mangedjez ti paday?
en: Why didn’t paday come?
She has a fever.
